en: Wine is a mocker, strong drink a brawler, and whoever is led astray by it is not wise.
zh: 酒能使人狂放，烈酒能使人喧嘩； 所有因醉酒而犯錯的，都沒有智慧。

en: The terror of a king is like the growling of a lion; whoever provokes him to anger forfeits his life.
zh: 王的震怒好像獅子的吼叫； 觸怒他的是自害己命。

en: It is an honor for a man to keep aloof from strife, but every fool will be quarreling.
zh: 平息紛爭就是人的榮耀； 只有愚妄人個個都愛爭執。

en: The sluggard does not plow in the autumn; he will seek at harvest and have nothing.
zh: 懶惰人冬天不耕種； 到收割的時候，出去求食，必一無所得。

en: The purpose in a man's heart is like deep water, but a man of understanding will draw it out.
zh: 人心裡的謀略如同深水， 唯有聰明人能汲引出來。

en: Many a man proclaims his own steadfast love, but a faithful man who can find?
zh: 很多人自稱忠誠， 但信實的人，誰能遇著呢？

en: The righteous who walks in his integrity- blessed are his children after him!
zh: 行為完全的義人， 他的後代是有福的。

en: A king who sits on the throne of judgment winnows all evil with his eyes.
zh: 君王坐在審判的位上， 他的眼目查察一切惡事。

en: Who can say, "I have made my heart pure; I am clean from my sin"?
zh: 誰能說：“我潔淨了我的心， 我是清潔無罪的”？

en: Unequal weights and unequal measures are both alike an abomination to the LORD.
zh: 不同的法碼，不同的量器， 兩樣都是耶和華所厭惡的。

en: Even a child makes himself known by his acts, by whether his conduct is pure and upright.
zh: 孩童的行動是否清潔正直， 憑他的行為就可以把他自己顯明出來。

en: The hearing ear and the seeing eye, the LORD has made them both.
zh: 能聽的耳朵和能看的眼睛， 兩樣都是耶和華所造的。

en: Love not sleep, lest you come to poverty; open your eyes, and you will have plenty of bread.
zh: 不要貪睡，免得你貧窮； 睜開眼睛，你才有飽餐。

en: "Bad, Bad," says the buyer, but when he goes away, then he boasts.
zh: 買東西的說：“不好，不好！” 離去以後，他就自誇。

en: There is gold and abundance of costly stones, but the lips of knowledge are a precious jewel.
zh: 雖有金子、許多紅寶石和寶器， 但充滿知識的嘴唇比這一切更寶貴。

en: Take a man's garment when he has put up security for a stranger, and hold it in pledge when he puts up security for foreigners.
zh: 誰為陌生人作保證人，就拿去誰的衣服； 誰替妓女作保證人，誰就要作擔保。

en: Bread gained by deceit is sweet to a man, but afterward his mouth will be full of gravel.
zh: 欺騙得來的食物，人總覺得甘甜； 事後他的口必充滿沙石。

en: Plans are established by counsel; by wise guidance wage war.
zh: 計劃要有籌算才能確立； 作戰也要倚靠智謀。

en: Whoever goes about slandering reveals secrets; therefore do not associate with a simple babbler.
zh: 到處搬弄是非的，洩露祕密； 口無遮攔的，不可與他結交。

en: If one curses his father or his mother, his lamp will be put out in utter darkness.
zh: 咒罵父母的， 他的燈必在漆黑的幽暗中熄滅。

en: An inheritance gained hastily in the beginning will not be blessed in the end.
zh: 起初迅速得來的產業， 最後卻不是福氣。

en: Do not say, "I will repay evil"; wait for the LORD, and he will deliver you.
zh: 你不要說：“我要以惡報惡”； 要等候耶和華，他必拯救你。

en: Unequal weights are an abomination to the LORD, and false scales are not good.
zh: 不同的法碼是耶和華所厭惡的； 詭詐的天平，也是邪惡的。

en: A man's steps are from the LORD; how then can man understand his way?
zh: 人的腳步是由耶和華所定， 人怎能明白自己的道路呢？

en: It is a snare to say rashly, "It is holy," and to reflect only after making vows.
zh: 如果有人輕率地說：“這是歸 神為聖之物”， 許願以後才重新考慮，就是自陷網羅。

en: A wise king winnows the wicked and drives the wheel over them.
zh: 智慧的王簸散惡人， 並用車輪碾他們。

en: The spirit of man is the lamp of the LORD, searching all his innermost parts.
zh: 人的靈是耶和華的燈， 探照人的臟腑。

en: Steadfast love and faithfulness preserve the king, and by steadfast love his throne is upheld.
zh: 慈愛和信實保護君王， 他的王位也藉慈愛維持。

en: The glory of young men is their strength, but the splendor of old men is their gray hair.
zh: 氣力是年輕人的榮耀， 白髮是老年人的尊榮。

en: Blows that wound cleanse away evil; strokes make clean the innermost parts.
zh: 鞭傷能除淨人的邪惡， 責打能洗淨人的臟腑。
